fixtures.description: Nominal Gen5 LTSSM training reaches L0 with complete equalization evidence
Illegal LTSSM transition summary must fail validator
Downtrained result without fallback reason must fail validator
Incomplete equalization evidence must fail validator
Unexpected negotiated width mismatch must fail validator
Missing LTSSM trace summary must fail validator
Unsupported schema version must fail validator
Retry count without recovery trigger must fail validator
Equalization marked complete but missing a nominal phase must fail validator
Expected degraded width with reason should remain review-visible but pass validation
Lane failures with explicit explanatory notes should remain valid and review-visible
Recovery trace summary inconsistent with visited states must fail validator
PM L1 after enumeration complete with ASPM enabled via CfgWr should pass PM validator
PM L1 before enumeration complete with PM_Request_Ack in window must fail PM validator
Hot-plug PASS scenario: 8.7s gap, ASPM disabled, GL9767 at 5G should pass hot-plug validator
Fast MUX switch (6us) with PM L1 before enum and stale AER must fail hot-plug validator
Compliant GL9767 config space: VID/DID present, MSI enabled, LTR and L1 PM Substates configured
Noncompliant: VID/DID never observed (FFFF:FFFF) but enumeration claimed complete
Compliant PM: D3hot with Transactions Pending=0, Trst observed, L1 PM Substates configured
Noncompliant hot-plug: SlotCtl written before CommandCompleted, T_Power_Up=50ms
Compliant AER: Surprise Down logged, registers cleared, low correctable count
Noncompliant AER: Surprise Down not logged and registers not cleared before new enumeration
Compliant DLL: InitFC both directions, no NAK, UpdateFC observed, no REPLAY_NUM rollover
Compliant TLP: no non-SC completions, no Poisoned TLP, no BAR violations
